title: Per-cycle apicover-enforce gate missed 3 new internal/core exports that then broke main CI — investigate the fleet-rebase-conflict-debugger re-audit's changed-set derivation
why: Cycle ship 6459f9ae (merge-rung2-scoped-merge-review lane, verify-run 2026-07-19) exported ScopedMergeDisposition/ScopedMergeResult/ScopedMergeReviewer in go/internal/core/mergerung2.go with no naming test. internal/core IS in go/.apicover-enforce and WAS touched, so audit's apicoverEnforceChangedDefault (touched∩enforced scope) should have FAILed the cycle — instead it shipped and the repo-wide CI apicover Phase-5 gate broke main for two consecutive pushes (runs 29699313444, 29701873135). The lane went through the GIT_FLEET_REBASE_NEEDED → recover:fleet-rebase-conflict-debugger → re-audit path with 'composition carry-forward: snapshot unavailable → falling back to full re-audit' — prime suspect: the re-audit's changedPackagesForAudit derivation (handoff-build.json staleness after debugger conflict-resolution, or FromGitChecked base drift after the rebase) no longer included internal/core, silently descoping the apicover gate. Same disease class as warnship_apicover_ci_gap (#288/#313) — per-cycle proof ≠ repo-wide CI gate, this time via the recovery path.
how_to_apply: Reproduce from the preserved artifacts: cycle run dir for the 6459f9ae ship (handoff-build.json changed-file list at re-audit time vs the actual ship diff). If the changed-set was stale/empty on the re-audit path, fix the derivation (re-derive from the REBASED worktree diff at re-audit dispatch, not the pre-conflict handoff), and add a regression test for changedPackagesForAudit after a fleet-rebase recovery. Hotfix for the immediate CI red already landed separately (apicover_mergerung2_test.go naming test).
evidence: CI runs 29699313444 + 29701873135 (main, red): 'UNCOVERED (no test names it): 3 — ScopedMergeDisposition/ScopedMergeResult/ScopedMergeReviewer (mergerung2.go)'; loop-verify2.log: 'recover:fleet-rebase-conflict-debugger' + 'composition carry-forward: snapshot unavailable'.
